title: Asemeia ilheotica
intro: Asemeia ilheotica, also known as Ilheotica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is rich in bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, protecting against oxidative stress, and inhibiting the growth of microorganisms. The health benefits of Asemeia ilheotica include its potential to alleviate symptoms of various diseases, including cardiovascular disorders, cancer, and neurodegenerative diseases. The most common herbal preparations made with Asemeia ilheotica include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.

This family is a group of about 100 genera of flowering plants native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The Malpighiaceae family is known for its diverse range of species, many of which are epiphytes or climbing plants.
